title: helichrysum × selago var. intermedium
intro: Helichrysum × selago var. intermedium, commonly known as the Yellow Everlasting, is a hybrid plant species within the Helichrysum genus, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and shrub-like appearance. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Helichrysum × selago var. intermedium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms associated with arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Helichrysum × selago var. intermedium can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
